content: agent2: implementing 'Add custom orientation transformer callback to exif_transpose' - will modify exif_transpose() in src/PIL/ImageOps.py (and tests in Tests/test_imageops.py). Should be additive (new optional param), let me know if you're touching exif_transpose too.
